message: NO TRADE ALERT: 08:36 PT check found Agentic at $2,000 cash with no positions/orders; MU, SMH, NVDA, AMD, MRVL, and NBIS were below prior close and/or below opening ranges, so no setup reached the 80+ score gate.
Outside regular market hours; Agentic account has cash only, no open positions, and no open/today equity orders, so no trade or exit review is actionable.
